name: Bloodline of Heresy
descriptionTemplate: Restore [Heal:Arg3] HP and dispel {Weakness} from self, apply [Arg4] {plural:[Arg4]|stack|stacks} of {Vulnerable} to all enemies. {Tentacle DMG} +[TentaclePower:Arg1]. {Counter} +[Counterattack:Arg2]. Before the start of the next turn, for each Attack taken, command 1 Tentacle to counterattack.
